_note: Catálogo seed de facções rastreáveis (FASE 19). Cada entry vira um story_card kind='story_card' data.type='FACTION'. O id é a chave de faction_reputations (player/crew/NPC). Facções emergentes (crew pirata nova com peso regional) ganham card FACTION via npc_generator e entram no tracking sem precisar estar aqui. Vila/gangue anônima NÃO entra (fica em relationship_delta). Crew pirata canônica (mesmo Yonko) não é instituição e não entra no seed (decisão 2026-06-10): relação com bandos vive em relationship/alianças.

factions.name: Marines
factions.description: Armed branch of the World Government. Institutional stance toward the crew modulated by each Marine's moral_code.

factions.name: World Government
factions.description: Political and bureaucratic body that governs affiliated nations. Distinct from the Marines (armed branch).

current_state.summary_text: Central political power of the known world.

factions.name: Cipher Pol
factions.description: Clandestine intelligence structure of the World Government. Reputation distinct from the general WG because it operates in secret.

current_state.summary_text: Secret service of the World Government.

factions.name: Revolutionary Army
factions.description: Armed movement that fights the World Government and the tyranny of the Celestial Dragons.

current_state.summary_text: Global insurgency against the World Government.

factions.name: Cross Guild
factions.description: Organization that offers contracts against Marines and protects pirates for payment.
